info.title: a2a-ask
info.description: A2A-Ask: CLI tool for interacting with A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol agents. Discover agents, send messages, stream responses, and manage tasks from the command line or via AI agent skills.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A2A-Ask: Interact with A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol agents from the command line

commands.name: discover
commands.description: Fetch and display an A2A agent card

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: Base URL of the agent (or direct agent card URL)

commands.name: send
commands.description: Send a message to an A2A agent

commands.name: stream
commands.description: Send a message with streaming response, or subscribe to task events

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get the current state of a task

commands.name: login
commands.description: Interactively authenticate with an A2A agent

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: Agent base URL to authenticate against

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Remove stored authentication token for an agent

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: Agent URL to remove stored token for

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show authentication status for an agent

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: Agent URL to check authentication status for
